productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Popart Red Flip Flop
description: Get stylish in these pop art flip flops from puma. With comfortable straps and a cushioned footbed, its a perfect gift for your feet on those relaxed days.Upper Synthetic twill lace straps with a cushioned under and a toe separator for absolute comfort and durability Midsole EVA footbed with art for style and cushioned comfort Outsole TPR outsole for durability Circular suction lugs throughout the footbed with curved forefoot for cushioned comfort and style shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
